---
title: "Age-related GWAS Visualization"
author: "Kimberly Olney, Ph.D."
date: "March 2026"
output: html_document
---

# Set up

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
.libPaths(c("/home/kolney/R/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-library/"))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, root.dir = ".")

library(data.table)
library(ggmanh)
library(qqman)
library(ggplot2)

# SNP annotation table
snp_anno <- fread("../snp_array/reference/NCBI_SNP_positions_with_gene_hg19ToHg38_lift_over.tsv")
snp_anno[, `:=`(gene = Gene, rsid = names)]

# Mapping from PLINK SNP IDs (CHR:POS:REF:ALT) back to rsIDs
id_map <- fread("../snp_array/reference/CHRPOSREFALT_to_rsid.txt", header = FALSE)
setnames(id_map, c("plink_id", "rsid"))

chr_labels <- c(as.character(1:22))
dir.create("../results/gwas", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

# Function of manhattan and qq plot
```{r}
process_age_gwas <- function(file_path, trait_name, colors, output_prefix) {
  
  # Load GWAS results
  gwas <- fread(file_path)
  
  # Keep additive test only
  gwas <- gwas[TEST == "ADD"]
  
  # Remove missing p-values
  gwas <- gwas[!is.na(P)]
  
  # Map PLINK SNP IDs back to rsIDs
  gwas <- merge(gwas, id_map, by.x = "SNP", by.y = "plink_id", all.x = TRUE)
  
  # Merge with SNP annotation
  gwas_snp <- merge(gwas, snp_anno, by = "rsid", all.x = TRUE)
  
  # Keep autosomes only
  gwas_snp[, CHR := as.character(CHR)]
  gwas_snp <- gwas_snp[CHR %in% chr_labels]
  gwas_snp[, CHR := factor(CHR, levels = chr_labels)]
  
  # Label suggestive hits
  gwas_snp[, label := ifelse(P < 1e-5 & !is.na(gene), gene, NA)]
  
  # Manhattan plot
  man_plot <- manhattan_plot(
    x = gwas_snp,
    pval.colname = "P",
    chr.colname = "CHR",
    pos.colname = "BP",
    plot.title = trait_name,
    y.label = "-log10(p-value)",
    chr.col = colors,
    label.colname = "label",
    label.font.size = 2.75,
    highlight.colname = "label",
    highlight.col = "black"
  )
  
  print(man_plot)
  
  ggsave(
    paste0("../results/gwas/manhattan_", output_prefix, ".pdf"),
    plot = man_plot,
    width = 8,
    height = 4.5
  )
  
  # QQ plot
  pdf(paste0("../results/gwas/qq_", output_prefix, ".pdf"), width = 5, height = 5)
  qqman::qq(
    gwas_snp$P,
    main = paste("QQ Plot:", trait_name),
    pch = 18,
    col = colors[1],
    cex = 1.5,
    las = 1
  )
  dev.off()
  
  # Show QQ plot in RMarkdown
  qqman::qq(
    gwas_snp$P,
    main = paste("QQ Plot:", trait_name),
    col = colors[1]
  )
  
  # Save annotated output
  fwrite(
    gwas_snp,
    paste0("../results/gwas/", output_prefix, "_annotated_results.tsv"),
    sep = "\t"
  )
  
  return(gwas_snp)
}
```

# GWAS of age
```{r}
tasks_age <- list(
  list(
    "../snp_array/associations_with_imputed_snps/Age_association_imputed_covar_adj.assoc.linear",
    "GWAS Age (All Samples)",
    c("#ce8430ff", "#715434ff"),
    "Age_AllSamples"
  ),
  list(
    "../snp_array/associations_with_imputed_snps/Longevity_GWAS_Controls_Only.assoc.linear",
    "GWAS Longevity (Controls Only)",
    c("#8c2d04", "#d95f0e"),
    "Age_ControlsOnly"
  ),
  list(
    "../snp_array/associations_with_imputed_snps/Age_of_Onset_GWAS_Cases_Only.assoc.linear",
    "GWAS Age of Onset (Cases Only)",
    c("#6a3d9a", "#b15928"),
    "Age_CasesOnly"
  )
)

age_results <- list()

for (task in tasks_age) {
  age_results[[task[[4]]]] <- process_age_gwas(
    file_path = task[[1]],
    trait_name = task[[2]],
    colors = task[[3]],
    output_prefix = task[[4]]
  )
}
```
